message: Added a CI public API baseline gate with checked-in package baselines and update guidance for intentional public API changes.

Verifier rejected 6a8f40e: check-api-compat-baseline.ps1 only baselines lines starting with public/protected internal/protected, so public enum members and multi-line public record primary-constructor parameters are not protected. Examples: SandboxError.cs, CompilerContracts.cs, LiveUpdateMode.cs, VerificationPolicy.cs. Failed verifier: Aristotle the 2nd.
Extended the public API baseline extractor to include public enum members and normalized multi-line public signatures, then refreshed checked-in baselines.
